channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SHRIPISTON] Shriram Pistons Recommends Final Dividend of ₹5 per Share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹5 per equity share (face value ₹10). This is in addition to the interim dividend of ₹5 already paid. The board also approved the re-appointment of directors Mr. Yasunori Maekawa and Mr. Pradeep Dinodia, and the appointment of M/s Chandra Wadhwa & Co. as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27. The 62nd AGM will be held on July 27, 2026, and the record date for the final dividend is July 20, 2026. Additionally, the board approved a proposal to raise up to ₹10,000 Million via QIP.

  • Final dividend of ₹5 per share recommended, in addition to ₹5 interim dividend.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Yasunori Maekawa and Mr. Pradeep Dinodia as Directors.
  • M/s Chandra Wadhwa & Co. appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • 62nd AGM to be held on July 27, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Board approves raising up to ₹10,000 Million via Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MANORAMA] Manorama Industries FY26 PAT Surges 108.1% to ₹2,332 Mn
item.description:
Manorama Industries Ltd announced its FY26 results, reporting a 76.1% YoY increase in revenue to ₹13,577 Mn. EBITDA grew by 92.5% YoY to ₹3,677 Mn, and PAT surged by 108.1% YoY to ₹2,332 Mn. The company expanded its Solvent Fractionation Plant 2 capacity by 30% and plans further strategic capex of approximately ₹460 crores over the next 2-3 years for expansion and diversification.

  • FY26 Revenue increased by 76.1% YoY to ₹13,577 Mn.
  • FY26 EBITDA grew by 92.5% YoY to ₹3,677 Mn.
  • FY26 PAT surged by 108.1% YoY to ₹2,332 Mn.
  • Company to invest ₹460 Cr in strategic capex for expansion.
  • Solvent Fractionation Plant 2 capacity increased by 30%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Manorama Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics: Monitoring Agency Report for Mar 2026
item.description:
Fractal Analytics Ltd's Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, indicates no deviation from the objects of the IPO. The report, reviewed by the Audit Committee and Board of Directors on May 11, 2026, confirms the utilization of IPO proceeds as per SEBI regulations. The IPO, aggregating to ₹1,023.50 crore, was monitored according to the agreement dated January 23, 2026, and May 04, 2026.

  • Fractal Analytics' Monitoring Agency Report shows no deviation from IPO objectives.
  • CARE Ratings Limited monitored the utilization of IPO proceeds.
  • The report covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • IPO size was ₹1,023.50 crore.
  • The report was reviewed by the Audit Committee and Board of Directors on May 11, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [BANKBARODA] Bank of Baroda: Senior Management Changes
item.description:
Bank of Baroda has announced changes in its senior management personnel (SMP) and functional heads. Mr. Sharma Sunil Kumar, Mrs. Manjula Devi G, and Mr. Mandva Naga Subrahmanyam have been appointed as Head-MSME Banking Co-Lending and Supply Chain Finance, Head, Credit Monitoring, and Head-Retail Liabilities & NRI Business, respectively, effective 11.05.2026. Mr. Sharma Prabhat K and Mr. Kumar Madhur have experienced a change in designation, also effective 11.05.2026.

  • Mr. Sharma Sunil Kumar appointed Head-MSME Banking Co-Lending and Supply Chain Finance.
  • Mrs. Manjula Devi G appointed Head, Credit Monitoring.
  • Mr. Mandva Naga Subrahmanyam appointed Head-Retail Liabilities & NRI Business.
  • Mr. Sharma Prabhat K and Mr. Kumar Madhur experience designation changes.
  • All changes are effective as of 11.05.2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF BARODA | Category: Management Change

item.title: [UNITDSPR] United Spirits Amends Royal Challengers Sale Agreement
item.description:
United Spirits Ltd (USL) has amended and restated its share purchase agreement (A&R SPA) dated May 11, 2026, for the sale of Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL). The amendment follows a purchaser change notice and involves the introduction of Big Banyan Holdings Pte. Ltd, Times Cricket LLP, and ICQ Opportunities R C Holdco, Ltd as new purchasers, while Aelius Investments Pte Ltd and Metropolitan Media Company Limited are retiring. The underlying consortium, sale shares (14,690 equity shares of RCSPL), and aggregate consideration of ₹166.6 billion remain unchanged.

  • USL amends share purchase agreement for Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited.
  • Big Banyan, Times LLP, and ICONIQ join as new purchasers.
  • Aelius Investments and Metropolitan Media Company retire as purchasers.
  • Sale involves 14,690 RCSPL shares for ₹166.6 billion.
  • Terms remain consistent with the original agreement disclosed March 24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITED SPIRITS LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [BIRET] Brookfield India REIT: FY26 Valuation Report
item.description:
Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has released its annual summary valuation report for assets for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. The report, along with investor presentations and press releases related to the audited financial results, is available on the company's website. The filing also includes the audited financial statements of Brookprop Management Services Private Limited, the manager to Brookfield India REIT, for the year ending March 31, 2026.

  • Brookfield India REIT releases FY26 annual summary valuation report.
  • Investor presentation and press release on FY26 financial results included.
  • Audited financials of Brookprop Management Services Pvt Ltd also disclosed.
  • Documents available on Brookfield India REIT website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KFINTECH] KFin Technologies to Meet with Analysts/Investors in May 2026
item.description:
KFin Technologies Ltd. will host meetings with analysts and institutional investors in May 2026. The meetings include a virtual one-on-one with Steinberg Asset Management on May 14, 2026, and an in-person one-on-one with Aditya Birla MF in Mumbai on May 15, 2026. The company will present information consistent with the presentation available on the stock exchange and company websites from April 29, 2026. The schedule is subject to change.

  • KFin Technologies to host Analyst/Institutional Investor meetings in May 2026.
  • Steinberg Asset Management meeting is virtual on May 14, 2026.
  • Aditya Birla MF meeting is in-person in Mumbai on May 15, 2026.
  • Presentation will align with the one on the company website from April 29, 2026.
  • Meeting schedule is subject to change based on exigencies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KFin Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SHRIPISTON] Shriram Pistons Recommends Final Dividend of ₹5 Per Share
item.description:
Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹5 per equity share (face value ₹10). This is in addition to the interim dividend already paid. The board also approved the re-appointment of directors Mr. Yasunori Maekawa and Mr. Pradeep Dinodia, and the appointment of M/s Chandra Wadhwa & Co. as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27. The 62nd AGM will be held on July 27, 2026, and the record date for the final dividend is July 20, 2026. The company also plans to raise up to ₹10,000 Million via QIP.

  • Final dividend of ₹5 per share recommended, in addition to the interim dividend.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Yasunori Maekawa and Mr. Pradeep Dinodia as directors.
  • M/s Chandra Wadhwa & Co. appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • 62nd AGM to be held on July 27, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Plans to raise up to ₹10,000 Million via Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [AKUMS] Akums Drugs Board Meeting Scheduled for May 14, 2026
item.description:
Akums Drugs and Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of a dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window, already closed, will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Akums Drugs board meeting set for May 14, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Dividend recommendation for FY26 to be discussed.
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours post results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akums Drugs and Pharmaceuticals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics FY26 Revenue Up 19%, Profit Up 30%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Ltd (BSE: 544700, NSE: FRACTAL) announced its consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Q4 revenue grew 17% YoY to ₹886 crore, with net income up 109% YoY to ₹116 crore. Full-year revenue reached ₹3,300 crore, a 19% increase YoY, and net income grew 30% to ₹287 crore. The Healthcare and Life Sciences (HLS) segment led growth, expanding 82% in Q4 and 66% for the full year.

  • Q4 revenue increased by 17% YoY to ₹886 crore.
  • Net income for Q4 grew 109% YoY to ₹116 crore.
  • Full-year revenue reached ₹3,300 crore, up 19% YoY.
  • Full-year net income increased by 30% to ₹287 crore.
  • HLS segment led growth with 82% YoY growth in Q4.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Quarterly Result
